description.ko: 가장 원시적인 유기적 생명을 표현하며, 빛과 이끼로 엮인 섬세하게 숨 쉬는 고치를 보여줍니다.
description.en: A representation of organic life at its most primordial, showing a delicate breathing cocoon of light and moss.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Cradle of Bioluminescence.' A translucent, pulsating cocoon structure woven from #7FB069 emerald moss and #2D5A3D vascular vines, suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent haze. It rhythmically exhales #FFE66D golden bioluminescent spores that swirl like liquid silk. Macro focus on the semi-permeable membranes, internal glowing capillary networks, high-speed fluid dynamics, Octane render, 8k, divine natural atmosphere.
